title: Expand configurable model support, including GPT-Image-2 for image workflows
notes: Suggestion #12 from admin export (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-21), clarified and scoped. C-LARA-2 should expose a broader, explicitly managed set of AI models rather than relying on a narrow/default subset. Immediate priority is to support GPT-Image-2 as a selectable option in relevant image-generation and regeneration paths. Scope: (1) Audit where model choices are currently hard-coded or indirectly configured (text generation, image generation, and review-adjacent flows). (2) Define a central model-catalog/configuration mechanism with safe defaults, capability metadata, and clear eligibility rules per task type. (3) Add GPT-Image-2 integration for page-image and picture-dictionary generation flows, with graceful fallback behavior when unavailable. (4) Expose model choice in organiser/admin UX where appropriate, and persist chosen model in job/stage metadata for traceability and reproducibility. (5) Add regression tests/docs covering model selection, fallback logic, and backward compatibility with existing projects.
